_comment: YOUR team. Keep in sync with the app after applying transfers (wcfantasy squad --apply-plan N does it for you). Player ids match players.json.
_free_transfers_note: 6 for the FINAL (next round). SF used all 5 free transfers (out: Trossard, Sanchez, Barcola, Rangel, Baena; in: Merino, Llorente, Mac Allister, Simon, Gordon).
_12th_man_note: SF 12th Man booster = Mikel Oyarzabal (id 1094, ESP FWD) — bonus scorer on top of the XI, not in player_ids.
_boosters_note: USED: qualification (R16), cs_shield (QF), 12th_man (SF -> Oyarzabal). REMAINING: max_captain (hold for FINAL) + wildcard (no value left; 6 free transfers cover any final rebuild, so it goes unused).
